Class ParameterFittingStudy.Result

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ParameterFittingStudy.Result
Enclosing class:
ParameterFittingStudy
public static final class ParameterFittingStudy.Result extends Object
Result from a parameter fitting study.
Version:
1.1
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Constructor Details

    • Result

      private Result(LevenbergMarquardtResult optimizerResult, double[] fittedParameters, String[] parameterNames, double[] calculatedValues, double[] residuals, double[] weightedResiduals, double rootMeanSquareError, double meanAbsoluteError, double weightedRootMeanSquareError, double reducedChiSquare, ObjectiveFunctionType objectiveFunctionType, double objectiveValue, int robustIterations, double[] validationCalculatedValues, double[] validationResiduals, double[] validationWeightedResiduals, double validationRootMeanSquareError, double validationMeanAbsoluteError, double validationWeightedRootMeanSquareError)
      Creates a result object.
      Parameters:
      optimizerResult - optimizer result
      fittedParameters - final fitted parameter values
      parameterNames - final fitted parameter names
      calculatedValues - model calculated values for each data point
      residuals - measured minus calculated residuals
      weightedResiduals - residuals divided by standard deviations
      rootMeanSquareError - unweighted root mean square error
      meanAbsoluteError - unweighted mean absolute error
      weightedRootMeanSquareError - weighted root mean square error
      reducedChiSquare - reduced chi-square using training residuals
      objectiveFunctionType - objective function type
      objectiveValue - final objective value
      robustIterations - number of robust reweighting passes
      validationCalculatedValues - validation calculated values
      validationResiduals - validation residuals
      validationWeightedResiduals - validation weighted residuals
      validationRootMeanSquareError - validation root mean square error
      validationMeanAbsoluteError - validation mean absolute error
      validationWeightedRootMeanSquareError - validation weighted root mean square error

  • Method Details

    • getOptimizerResult

      public LevenbergMarquardtResult getOptimizerResult()
      Returns the optimizer result.
      Returns:
      Levenberg-Marquardt result

    • isConverged

      public boolean isConverged()
      Returns whether the optimizer converged.
      Returns:
      true if the optimizer result is converged

    • getFittedParameters

      public double[] getFittedParameters()
      Returns fitted parameter values.
      Returns:
      fitted parameter values

    • getFittedParameter

      public double getFittedParameter(int index)
      Returns one fitted parameter value.
      Parameters:
      index - zero-based parameter index
      Returns:
      fitted parameter value
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is outside the parameter array

    • getFittedParameter

      public double getFittedParameter(String parameterName)
      Returns one fitted parameter value by name.
      Parameters:
      parameterName - configured parameter name
      Returns:
      fitted parameter value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the parameter name is not found

    • getParameterNames

      public String[] getParameterNames()
      Returns fitted parameter names.
      Returns:
      fitted parameter names

    • getCalculatedValues

      public double[] getCalculatedValues()
      Returns calculated values for each data point.
      Returns:
      calculated values

    • getResiduals

      public double[] getResiduals()
      Returns measured minus calculated residuals.
      Returns:
      residuals

    • getWeightedResiduals

      public double[] getWeightedResiduals()
      Returns weighted residuals.
      Returns:
      residuals divided by standard deviations

    • getRootMeanSquareError

      public double getRootMeanSquareError()
      Returns the root mean square error.
      Returns:
      unweighted root mean square error

    • getMeanAbsoluteError

      public double getMeanAbsoluteError()
      Returns the mean absolute error.
      Returns:
      unweighted mean absolute error

    • getWeightedRootMeanSquareError

      public double getWeightedRootMeanSquareError()
      Returns the weighted root mean square error.
      Returns:
      weighted root mean square error

    • getReducedChiSquare

      public double getReducedChiSquare()
      Returns the reduced chi-square for the fitting data.
      Returns:
      reduced chi-square

    • getObjectiveFunctionType

      public ObjectiveFunctionType getObjectiveFunctionType()
      Returns the objective function type.
      Returns:
      objective function type

    • getObjectiveValue

      public double getObjectiveValue()
      Returns the final objective value.
      Returns:
      final objective value

    • getRobustIterations

      public int getRobustIterations()
      Returns the number of robust reweighting passes completed.
      Returns:
      robust reweighting pass count

    • getValidationCalculatedValues

      public double[] getValidationCalculatedValues()
      Returns validation calculated values.
      Returns:
      validation calculated values, or empty array if no validation set was used

    • getValidationResiduals

      public double[] getValidationResiduals()
      Returns validation residuals.
      Returns:
      validation residuals, or empty array if no validation set was used

    • getValidationWeightedResiduals

      public double[] getValidationWeightedResiduals()
      Returns validation weighted residuals.
      Returns:
      validation weighted residuals, or empty array if no validation set was used

    • getValidationRootMeanSquareError

      public double getValidationRootMeanSquareError()
      Returns validation root mean square error.
      Returns:
      validation root mean square error, or NaN if no validation set was used

    • getValidationMeanAbsoluteError

      public double getValidationMeanAbsoluteError()
      Returns validation mean absolute error.
      Returns:
      validation mean absolute error, or NaN if no validation set was used

    • getValidationWeightedRootMeanSquareError

      public double getValidationWeightedRootMeanSquareError()
      Returns validation weighted root mean square error.
      Returns:
      validation weighted root mean square error, or NaN if no validation set was used
